_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Designing secure systems involves leading design and review solutions to complex problems with system architectures by defining and challenging patterns and principles; create precedents and set direction.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of privacy-by-design and privacy-by-default principles, including their application to system architecture, data minimization, purpose limitation, storage limitation, and consent management design patterns.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.459), SP-K-003 (SP, cosine: 0.457).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.497). Shared vocabulary: [design, patterns, principles, system]. DDaT-only terms [architectures, challenging, complex, create, defining, designing] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, architecture, consent, data, default, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.844, R=0.850). Balanced P/R — the 27-word DDaT element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Designing secure systems involves leading design and review solutions to complex" and "Knowledge of privacy-by-design and privacy-by-default principles, including thei" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.485 ≈ STS 0.497 (gap 0.013). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, patterns, principles, system] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.9%. Shared tokens: [design, patterns, principles, system]. DDaT-only: [architectures, challenging, complex, create, defining, designing]. WIDAI-only: [application, architecture, consent, data, default, knowledge].
